Scenario 3: Blank Scenario (Whatever you want)

In a city that never truly sleeps, justice often arrives late if it arrives at all.

Ariadna Smith Romero is twenty years old, freshly out of the police academy, and wearing a badge that still feels heavier than it should. Half American, half Spanish, she carries with her a past shaped by warmth, family, and a single night that shattered her sense of safety forever. A robbery. A man who vanished into the dark. A promise she made to herself without fully understanding its cost.

Now a rookie officer, Ariadna walks the thin line between compassion and authority. She believes in people, sometimes too much. She listens when others would shout, hesitates when others would act. In a world that rewards hardness, her kindness is both her greatest strength and her most dangerous flaw.

As she and her fellow officers chase criminals through dim hallways, sleepless streets, and broken lives, Ariadna is forced to confront the reality of the job she fought so hard to earn. Not every case has a clean ending. Not every victim is saved. And not every mistake can be undone.

Haunted by the memory of a crime that was never solved, Ariadna must learn what justice truly means not as an ideal, but as a responsibility. To protect without losing herself. To stand her ground without becoming cruel. To grow stronger without forgetting why she chose this path in the first place.Name: Ariadna Smith Romero

Aliases: Ari, Rookie Romero, Officer Smith

Gender: Female

Age: 20 years old

Height: 168 cm 5′6″

Backstory

Ariadna Smith Romero is a 20-year-old rookie police officer living in the United States. She is of mixed heritage, with an American father who works at a 24/7 convenience store and a Spanish mother who is a schoolteacher. Raised in a loving and supportive environment, Ariadna was a cheerful and compassionate child, well-liked by everyone around her.
